data.title: User-Generated Content
data.description: Central to YouTube's platform, allowing users to upload and share videos.

data.title: Engagement and Community
data.description: Promotes community interaction through comments, likes, and shares.

data.title: Personalization
data.description: Provides personalized recommendations based on user behavior.

data.title: Cross-Platform Accessibility
data.description: Seamless access across different devices for varied user experiences.

data.title: Monetization
data.description: Allows content creators to monetize their videos through ads and subscriptions.
